src: The OwlSint tool is a tool for searching phone number information and for tracking phone numbers,perhaps only a few countries whose location can be tracked using this tool. This tool was created by Mr,OwlBird05/Abid .Z to help you get phone number information.
ja: 電話番号情報の検索と位置追跡のための OSINT ツール OwlSint。一部の国のみ位置追跡に対応。Mr. OwlBird05/Abid .Z 作
